name: Chocolate Dipped Raisins
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces Hershey's® Milk Chocolate Bar, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate bar and disks. Place the saucepan in hot water to maintain the dipping consistency.
2. Dip several raisins at a time into the melted chocolate.
3. Place the dipped raisins in paper candy cups. Repeat with the remaining chocolate and raisins.
4. Refrigerate until the chocolate sets, about 10 minutes.
5. Store covered in the refrigerator.
